assessor_raw: Heart failure readmission prediction: methodologically sound. Temporal split with site and risk tier stratification. IHF cohort definition with planned readmission exclusion verified by manual spot-check. GRU/transformer vs. L2-regularized logistic regression is a fair architectural comparison. ROC-AUC primary metric appropriate for risk ranking. Decision curve analysis, calibration, and site-stratified AUC are comprehensive. Measurement frequency confound check addresses key clinical data concern. Preprocessing fit-apply separation correct. Scope bounded to same institution. Verdict: defense_wins.
